name: Max Bemis
description: '''Maxim Adam Bemis''' ({{IPAc-en|ˈ|b|iː|m|ᵻ|s}}; born April 6, 1984) is an American musician, best known as the lead singer and primary songwriter of the rock band [[Say Anything (band)|Say Anything]]. He sang alongside [[Chris Conley (musician)|Chris Conley]] in the [[Supergroup (music)|supergroup]] [[Two Tongues]] (which featured band members from Say Anything and [[Saves the Day]]). He plays alongside his former wife [[Sherri DuPree]] under the name Perma, and is a comic book writer, chiefly for [[Marvel Comics]], creating ''[[X-Men: Worst X-Man Ever]]'' and ''[[Foolkiller|Foolkiller: Psycho Therapy]]''.
